title: Coral On Cactuses
description:
Makes fan coral be placed on cacti properly.

The moisture within the cacti will keep the coral alive.
body:
This mod makes coral be placed on cactuses properly.
 

This seems like a easy mod I have made and ripped it from Quark to make it a single mod!

 

Credit goes to the original Quark modders.

 

Backport it?

NO! It will always go through latest versions.
